message:
feat: add binary body support to fetch shim and expand asupersync coverage in tools/resources/package_manager

Supporting improvements for the asupersync migration and JS runtime:

src/extensions_js.rs (+71):
- Add __pi_fetch_body_bytes_to_base64 helper for encoding Uint8Array,
  ArrayBuffer, and TypedArray bodies as base64 for the pi.http hostcall
- Wire body_bytes field into fetch() shim so binary request bodies
  (e.g. protobuf, file uploads) pass through without UTF-8 coercion
- Add pijs_fetch_binary_body_uses_body_bytes_hostcall test

src/package_manager.rs (+80):
- Migrate filesystem operations to asupersync async fs where applicable
- Expand error handling for package resolution edge cases

src/resources.rs (+58):
- Migrate resource metadata reads to asupersync async filesystem
- Add additional resource discovery paths

src/tools.rs (+66):
- Expand tool execution infrastructure with Cx-aware patterns
- Ensure tool invocations inherit parent Cx for cancellation support

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
